adversary-waived — a package that PASSES via explicit cascade-class waivers.

Same thin two-failure-state machine as adversary-thin, but the three hard
cascade classes (partial-failure, rollback/compensation, escalation) are
explicitly WAIVED with reasons in decisions.md, while recovery/resume and
adversarial-verify are covered by real cases. Every class is addressed —
covered-or-waived — so the gate exits 0. Proves the escape hatch (v2's CB-1
waiver pattern) works and that waivers may live in decisions.md.

Dot-prefixed so gate-check's collectMdFiles walker skips it.
